summary: The plugin bundle, marketplace entry, bundled MCP config, and sync path are present and internally consistent with the canonical skill boundary.

acceptance_criteria.reason: The plugin manifest exists and positions the bundle as an MD3 workflow plugin for Codex.
The bundled skill copy exists under plugin/skills/material-3.
The repo documents the bundled skill as a packaging artifact and keeps canonical authoring in .agents/skills/material-3.
Bundled MCP configuration exists and is explicitly documented as repo-local deterministic support.
A local marketplace example exists and points to the repo-local plugin bundle.
Packaging sync rules are documented and the sync check proves the bundle matches canonical source state.
